svg.title: teb2 full file org chart
svg.desc: Complete top-down org chart of all teb2 files grouped under their modules, showing file name and I/O contract for each leaf node.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Write types.h in K&R C with all teb2 domain structs')
sendPrompt('Write errors.h in K&R C with all teb2 error codes')
sendPrompt('Write config.c in K&R C — env_path in, Config out')
sendPrompt('Write hash.c in K&R C — password+HashConfig in, HashResult out')
sendPrompt('Write token.c in K&R C — UserClaims+secret in, TokenResult out')
sendPrompt('Write rbac.c in K&R C — role+permission in, bool out')
sendPrompt('Write goals.c in K&R C — Db+GoalQuery in, GoalResult out')
sendPrompt('Write tasks.c in K&R C — Db+TaskQuery in, TaskResult out')
sendPrompt('Write schema.sql for teb2 — goals, tasks, users, tickets tables')
sendPrompt('Write vault.c in K&R C — Bytes+Key8 in, CipherResult out using DES')
sendPrompt('Write http.c in K&R C — SerialReq+Cred in, SerialResult out')
sendPrompt('Write browser.c in K&R C — SerialCmd+Cred in, BrowserResult out')
sendPrompt('Write channel.h in K&R C with AgentMsg tagged union')
sendPrompt('Write coord.c in K&R C — AgentMsg in, AgentMsg out, rule-table dispatch')
sendPrompt('Write finance.c in K&R C — AgentMsg in, AgentMsg out, int64 cents only')
sendPrompt('Write api/goals.c in K&R C — HttpReq+Ctx in, HttpResp out')
sendPrompt('Write api/tasks.c in K&R C — HttpReq+Ctx in, HttpResp out')

svg.text: n→n = inputs → outputs per file · 0→0 = declarations only · click any file to generate it
3. auth/* · db/goals.c db/tasks.c · exec/vault.c exec/http.c exec/browser.c
